import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let bytes = string.split_whitespace("")
  mut depth = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut valid = true

  while i < string.len(line)
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end

    if b == 40
      depth = depth + 1
    else if b == 41
      if depth == 0
        valid = false
      else
        depth = depth - 1
      end
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  if valid and depth == 0
    println("YES")
  else
    println("NO")
  end

  Ok(())
end
